title: AMP forget response
description: Response payload returned by the forget operation, summarizing what was deleted per store. Shape inferred from spec section 3.3 (soft vs. hard delete) and section 5 (per-store aggregation).

forgotten_ids.description: Ids of memories that were forgotten (soft- or hard-deleted) by this call.

stores.description: Per-store breakdown of the forget operation.

count.description: Number of memories forgotten in this store.

error.description: Error message if this store failed; null on success.

hard_delete.description: Echo of the request flag: true if rows were removed, false if soft-deleted (deleted_at set).

pending_approval.description: True if the delete is staged pending governance review.

approval_url.description: Governance review URL when pending_approval is true; otherwise null.
